physical_meaning: 2024 low-carbon-electricity share of the regional grid
current_parameterization_CA_OH_US: CA mean=0.656 kappa=80; OH mean=0.247 kappa=80; US mean=0.4515 kappa=60
rationale: Evidence-anchored at EIA state-by-state reporting. Spread is dominated by a constant level offset that is swamped after ~2035 by trajectory uncertainty. Dropping variance here simplifies the reader's interpretation without hiding real risk.

current_parameterization_CA_OH_US: CA mean=0.041 kappa=120; OH mean=0.00668 kappa=120; US mean=0.0335 kappa=100
rationale: Regionally well-measured. Fleet stock evolves so quickly under ev_growth that a 2024 Beta-perturbation is absorbed within 3-5 years.

Literature disagreement between operational-only and life-cycle-inclusive. High tail 0.08 reflects LCA-grade envelope; operational-only view sits at <=0.05. Keep adjustable so the reader can see both readings.
Well-bounded physical range (natural-gas-combined-cycle to coal). Low and high ends correspond to named generation technologies.

physical_meaning: CO2-equivalent intensity for ICECAV electronic-load fuel
rationale: Tight physical bound around EPA gasoline CO2-per-litre. Minor sensitivity to well-to-wheel vs tank-to-wheel convention.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on L3 ECAV per-level row
rationale: Dossier S2-01: this per-level axis and the per-subsystem axis compound multiplicatively on every ECAV cell. The per-subsystem axis already captures between-column variation; keeping both is a dual-axis duplication inflating sigma to ~sqrt(sigma_level^2+sigma_sub^2) per cell.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on L4 ECAV per-level row
rationale: Same dual-axis duplication as F06.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on L5 ECAV per-level row
rationale: Same dual-axis duplication as F06.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on ECAV sensing column
rationale: Largest ECAV sensing spread (camera/LiDAR/radar mix). Evidence-based but wide.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on ECAV computing column
rationale: Reflects GPU/ASIC efficiency variation across vendors; modest.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on ECAV communication column
rationale: Largest single lognormal sigma: 5G vehicle-comm power draws span wide in the measurement literature.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on Basic STI row
rationale: Dossier S2-02: same dual-axis compounding on STI.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on Semi STI row
rationale: Dual-axis duplication.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on Highly STI row
rationale: Dual-axis duplication.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on STI sensing column
rationale: Large spread for roadside sensor suites; retained as single column axis.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on STI computing column
rationale: Edge-computing variance.

physical_meaning: multiplicative scale on STI communication column
rationale: Road-side to OBU link variance.
Concentration alpha is moderately informative. Shape legitimate; widening or narrowing has real meaning.
Same as F18 on STI side.

physical_meaning: ICE overhead multiplier on CAV electronics
rationale: Alternator-overhead range. Modestly affects early-horizon ICE emissions; becomes less important as fleet electrifies.
Pre-2024 cohort decays out by 2036 under retire_year logic. Its perturbation is visible mainly in the first 8-10 years and is dwarfed by L3 divergence later.
Evidence-anchored fleet-turnover parameter. Directly controls cohort rotation and therefore peak/turning years.
Primary L3 pathway-divergence driver. 2075 target sets the slope of the ramp; small target changes produce large long-horizon divergences via compounding ECAV count * per-cav power.
Second L3 pathway-divergence driver. Same mechanism as F23 on STI side.
Compounding exponential: a 0.015 sd on a 51-year horizon widens the 2075 BEV-share by a factor ~2.3. Dominant contributor to post-2035 band explosion.
Compounding exponential drives long-horizon emissions divergence; primary interpretation-boundary driver.
Moore-law-style decay multiplier on ECAV computing. Triangular tails produce asymmetric band; mid-horizon effect.
Well-bounded by demographic data. Small effect on bands but controls absolute fleet level.
Underconstrained L2 gap (dossier S2-05). Priors do not exist; all variance enters via scale factors. Must be disclosed to the reader but cannot be directly adjusted in this release.
duplicates: all variance currently routed through F06-F17

rationale: Structural shock: discrete labelled scenario. Must NEVER be folded into ordinary MC bands. Exposed only on the Structural Shocks panel.
Structural shock; separate panel.

Structural shock; separate panel.
Structural shock; supplementary-only.
